series_metadata.series_description: This series includes the Alco-Sensor RBT III Instrument Checklist, the Alco-Sensor RBT III Operational Checklist, the Intoxilyzer 5000 Instrument Checklist, the Intoxilyzer 5000 Operational Checklist, the BAC Datamaster Instrument Checklist, the BAC Operational Checklist, the BAC Verifier Instrument Checklist and the BAC Verifier Opeational Checklist. These records are verification that the instrument used to do the test is in proper working order, the test results are accurate and to identify the subject being given the test.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The records are to be maintained for three years following the date of decertification of the instrument., Paper: Shred
